ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant type */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Common name of the plant */,
  "species" TEXT /* Scientific name of the plant species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plant characteristics */,
  "family" TEXT /* Plant family */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Plant genus */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Plant habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant type used in the experiment */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment applied in the experiment */,
  "concentration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the concentration of the treatment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer who recorded the experiment */,
  "experimental_design" TEXT /* Design of the experiment (e.g., randomized controlled trial) */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES observers ("observer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_concentration_id FOREIGN KEY ("concentration_id") REFERENCES concentrations ("concentration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment and its intended effects */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method of applying the treatment (e.g., topical, soil) */,
  "dosage" REAL /* Dosage of the treatment (e.g., mg/kg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concentrations" (
  "concentration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concentration level */,
  "concentration_value" REAL /* The value of the concentration */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the concentration */,
  "stock_solution" REAL /* Stock solution concentration (e.g., mg/mL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concentration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uptake_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment for which the measurement was taken */,
  "uptake_value" REAL /* Value of the uptake measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used for measurement (e.g., spectrophotometry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observers" (
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observer */,
  "observer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the observer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the observer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the observer belongs */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Observer's affiliation (e.g., university, research institute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of environmental conditions */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment during which the conditions were recorded */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the experiment */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the experiment */,
  "light_intensity" REAL /* Light intensity during the experiment */,
  "condition_date" TEXT /* Date when the conditions were recorded */,
  "co2_level" REAL /* CO2 level during the experiment */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment that has been versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* The version number of the experiment */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment to which the note applies */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note describing observations or procedures */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was recorded */,
  "note_author" TEXT /* Author of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_notes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* User's affiliation (e.g., university, research institute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user participating in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the user's collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the user's collaboration */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the user's contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment from which the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Word) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment from which the publication was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the publication */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_content" TEXT /* Content of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
